---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a narrow, doctrine-preserving change.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

What serious product need is not served by the current system?

## Existing fit

Which existing foundation, primitive, component, or recipe did you try first?

## Proposed change

Describe the narrowest acceptable addition or revision.

## State and accessibility

Which required states and accessibility rules would this change need to carry?

## Drift risk

How does the proposal avoid becoming generic, decorative, or open-ended?

## Docs and contract impact

Which public docs, schema sections, or validation rules would need to change?
